geo.title: Live Events near Las Vegas, NV
geo.name: Las Vegas NV
geo.subtitle: Concert, Comedy, Sports & Theater Tickets in Las Vegas, NV
geo.content:
Guide to Live Events in Las Vegas: Concerts, Sports and Shows Near You

Las Vegas, Nevada, is a vibrant hub for live events, offering everything from concerts and theater performances to major sporting events and music festivals. Whether you want to cheer on your favorite team or catch a chart-topping artist live, Vivid Seats has you covered.

Things to Do in Las Vegas This Week

This week in Las Vegas, catch country powerhouse Chris Stapleton at Dolby Live at Park MGM on Thursday, then sing along with Backstreet Boys at Sphere at The Venetian Resort on Saturday as rock legends Def Leppard take over The Colosseum at Caesars Palace and the R&B showcase Love Affair heats up Orleans Arena.

Sports fans can cheer the Vegas Golden Knights at T-Mobile Arena on Thursday, and night owls can cap the weekend with laughs from Sebastian Maniscalco at Encore Theater At Wynn Las Vegas late Saturday.

Things to Do in Las Vegas Next Week

Las Vegas turns up the volume next week: catch Cardi B at T-Mobile Arena, rock out with Def Leppard at The Colosseum at Caesars Palace, and sing along to Backstreet Boys at Sphere at The Venetian Resort.

R&B icon Babyface headlines Pearl Concert Theater at Palms Casino Resort, while the immersive The Wizard of Oz at Sphere offers a dazzling daytime escape, and New Kids on the Block bring the nostalgia to Dolby Live at Park MGM.
geo.contentSports:
Upcoming Sports in Las Vegas: Games, Teams & Matchups Near You

Live sports thrive in Las Vegas, where fans pack venues across the city year-round. From sold-out rivalry games to weekday matchups, the city's sports venues deliver big moments for every kind of fan. Browse schedules by sport, date, or venue to find the perfect game in Las Vegas. Whether it's a marquee showdown or a spontaneous night out, you can find seats on Vivid Seats.

Frequently Asked Questions about Las Vegas Sports Tickets

What sporting events are happening in Las Vegas this week?

Top sporting events this week in Las Vegas include NHL action as the Vegas Golden Knights skate at T-Mobile Arena and a stacked UFC Fight Night at Meta Apex. College basketball fans can see the UNLV Rebels men's basketball (NCAA) at the Thomas and Mack Center, while BattleBots battles take place at the BattleBots Arena behind Horseshoe Las Vegas and a Big Game viewing party happens at House of Blues Las Vegas. Nearby in Henderson, the Henderson Silver Knights (Hockey) play at Lee's Family Forum.

What sporting events are happening in Las Vegas next week?

Next week in Las Vegas catch UNLV Rebels Mens Basketball at Thomas and Mack Center, with the Rebels' opponent to be announced. Lacrosse fans can see the Las Vegas Desert Dogs at Lee's Family Forum, also with opponents to be confirmed. For something different, BattleBots brings robot combat to BattleBots Arena Behind Horseshoe Las Vegas, MicroMania Wrestling takes place at The Nerd, and the NPC Classic runs at Alexis Park All Suite Resort, each featuring lineups of visiting competitors.

How can I find upcoming games and sports events in Las Vegas?

Finding upcoming sports events in Las Vegas is easy on Vivid Seats. At the top of this page, you’ll find a discovery tool featuring the most popular teams, matchups, and games across every league. You can browse by sport, venue, or date to explore events happening this week and beyond, all with real-time ticket availability and seating options.

Can I get last-minute sports tickets in Las Vegas?

Yes, you can often find last-minute sports tickets in Las Vegas on Vivid Seats. Whether you're planning ahead or deciding to catch a game on the fly, Vivid Seats updates listings in real time, so fans can secure verified tickets right up until kickoff, first pitch, or tipoff.

Is Vivid Seats legit for sports tickets in Las Vegas?

Yes! Vivid Seats is a trusted ticket marketplace used by over 100 million fans. When you buy Las Vegas sports tickets on Vivid Seats, every order is backed by our 100% Buyer Guarantee. That means your purchase is safe, your tickets will arrive before the event, and they'll be valid or your money back.

Are sports tickets guaranteed on Vivid Seats?

Absolutely. Every Las Vegas sports ticket sold on Vivid Seats comes with our 100% Buyer Guarantee, which ensures:

  • Your transaction will be secure.
  • Your tickets will be delivered before your event.
  • Your tickets will be valid and authentic or your money back.

Our mission is to make buying sports tickets stress-free, so you can focus on enjoying the game.

Are fees included in the price I see on Vivid Seats?

Vivid Seats uses All-In Pricing, so you'll see the full cost of a sports ticket in Las Vegas, including fees, upfront as you shop. No surprises at checkout.

What happens if my Las Vegas game is canceled or postponed?

If your game is canceled, you'll receive a full refund. If an event has been postponed or rescheduled, rest assured that your tickets will be valid for the new date. For some rescheduled games, the primary source of the tickets will reissue all previously purchased tickets with new bar codes. If this occurs, the seller will notify us, and we’ll deliver new tickets and remind you to discard your old ones.

Does Vivid Seats have a rewards program?

Yes! Vivid Seats offers a leading ticket loyalty program: Vivid Seats Rewards. Fans earn credit on every purchase, which can be redeemed for future tickets. The more events you attend, the more perks you can unlock:

  • A free 11th ticket after 10 purchases
  • Birthday rewards
  • Seat upgrades and VIP experiences
  • Exclusive access to pregame or on-field events with select teams
geo.contentConcerts:
Upcoming Concerts in Las Vegas: Live Music & Tour Dates Near You

Las Vegas is a powerhouse for live music, welcoming world-class artists and rising stars to stages big and small. From massive arena tours to intimate club shows, there's a concert to catch on most nights, and Vivid Seats is here to help you find your next unforgettable night out.

Frequently Asked Questions about Las Vegas Concert Tickets

What are some upcoming concerts in Las Vegas this week?

This week in Las Vegas, catch big-name concerts across the Strip and beyond: Chris Stapleton plays Dolby Live at Park MGM on Feb 5, joined that night by Jessie J at House of Blues Las Vegas. On Feb 7 pop acts and rock legends take over - the Backstreet Boys at the Sphere at The Venetian Resort, Def Leppard at The Colosseum at Caesars Palace, Love Affair at Orleans Arena, and late-night dance sets from John Summit at LIV Nightclub. From smaller theater stages to massive arenas and nightclub dance floors, there is something for every music fan.

What are some upcoming concerts in Las Vegas next week?

Next week Las Vegas heats up with big-name shows across pop, rock, hip-hop and Latin music, from arena spectacles to intimate theater nights. Catch Cardi B at T-Mobile Arena, Def Leppard at The Colosseum at Caesars Palace, and Backstreet Boys at Sphere at The Venetian Resort, while New Kids on the Block plays Dolby Live at Park MGM, Babyface appears at Pearl Concert Theater at Palms Casino Resort, and Marc Anthony brings Latin rhythms to Fontainebleau Las Vegas.

How can I find upcoming concerts in Las Vegas?

Finding upcoming concerts in Las Vegas is easy on Vivid Seats. At the top of this page, you’ll find a search and discovery tool highlighting the most popular concerts and upcoming events in the city. You can browse by artist, venue, genre, or date to explore shows happening this week and beyond, all with real-time ticket availability and seating options.

Can I get last-minute concert tickets in Las Vegas?

Yes, you can often find last-minute concert tickets in Las Vegas on Vivid Seats. Whether you’re planning ahead or making a spontaneous decision, Vivid Seats makes it easy to secure verified tickets right up until showtime.

Is Vivid Seats legit for concert tickets in Las Vegas?

Yes! Vivid Seats is a trusted ticket marketplace used by over 100 million fans. When you buy Las Vegas concert tickets on Vivid Seats, every order is backed by our 100% Buyer Guarantee. That means your purchase is safe, your tickets will arrive before the event, and they'll be valid or your money back.

Are tickets guaranteed on Vivid Seats?

Absolutely. Every Las Vegas concert ticket sold on Vivid Seats comes with our 100% Buyer Guarantee, which ensures:

  • Your transaction will be secure.
  • Your tickets will be delivered before your event.
  • Your tickets will be valid and authentic or your money back.

Our mission is to make buying concert tickets stress-free, so you can focus on enjoying your event.

What happens if my Las Vegas concert is canceled or postponed?

If your event is canceled, you'll receive a full refund. If an event has been postponed or rescheduled, rest assured that your tickets will be valid for the rescheduled date. geo.contentTheater:
Upcoming Theater & Comedy Shows in Las Vegas: Plays, Musicals & Stand-Up Near You

Las Vegas is one of the best cities for live entertainment, offering an incredible mix of Broadway hits, touring plays, and stand-up comedy. From major theaters and comedy clubs to intimate performance spaces, there's always a show to see in Las Vegas, and Vivid Seats makes it easy to find tickets for every laugh and standing ovation.

Frequently Asked Questions about Las Vegas Theater & Comedy Tickets

What theater or comedy shows are happening in Las Vegas this week?

This week in Las Vegas, catch comedy heavyweights Sebastian Maniscalco at Encore Theater At Wynn Las Vegas, Daniel Tosh at Cosmopolitan of Las Vegas, and Eddie Griffin at Saxe Theater at Planet Hollywood Resort and Casino. Theatre and spectacle fans can see Cirque du Soleil O at Bellagio or the large-scale production The Wizard of Oz at Sphere at The Venetian Resort, while Shin Lim brings acclaimed magic to Palazzo Theatre at the Venetian Las Vegas. From intimate comedy rooms to arena-scale shows, these headline acts showcase the breadth of live entertainment across Las Vegas venues.

What theater or comedy shows are happening in Las Vegas next week?

Catch The Wizard of Oz at Sphere at Sphere at The Venetian Resort, experience the adults-only circus Absinthe at The Spiegeltent at Caesars Palace, or enjoy the immersive spectacle Awakening at Wynn Las Vegas. For laughs, see Penn and Teller at Penn and Teller Theater at Rio Las Vegas, catch Matt McCusker at Palazzo Theatre at the Venetian Las Vegas, or enjoy Hermanos De Leche Gira at Sahara Las Vegas.

How can I find upcoming theater and comedy shows in Las Vegas?

Finding upcoming theater and comedy events in Las Vegas is simple with Vivid Seats. At the top of this page, you'll find a carousel of popular plays, musicals, and comedy shows in the city. Browse by theater and comedy tickets in Las Vegas under $100, top picks, family-friendly events, venue or date to discover events happening this week and beyond, with real-time ticket availability and seating options.

Yes, you can often find last-minute theater and comedy tickets in Las Vegas on Vivid Seats. Whether it’s a spontaneous night out or a sold-out show you don’t want to miss, Vivid Seats makes it easy to secure verified tickets right up until showtime.

That means your purchase is safe, your tickets will arrive before the event, and they'll be valid or your money back.

Absolutely. Every Las Vegas theater and comedy ticket sold on Vivid Seats comes with our 100% Buyer Guarantee, which ensures:

  • Your tickets will be valid and authentic or your money back.

Our mission is to make buying tickets stress-free, so you can focus on enjoying the show.

Are fees included in the price I see on Vivid Seats?

Vivid Seats uses All-In Pricing, so you'll see the full cost of a theater or comedy ticket in Las Vegas, including fees, upfront as you shop. No surprises at checkout.

What happens if my Las Vegas show is canceled or postponed?

If your show is canceled, you'll receive a full refund. If an event has been postponed or rescheduled, your tickets will remain valid for the new date. For some rescheduled performances, the primary ticket source may reissue tickets with updated barcodes. If this occurs, we’ll deliver your new tickets and remind you to discard any previous versions.
